text:
SRGCL_PRCDR_PRFRM_25_DT 
TYPE: 
DATE 
LENGTH: 
8 
SOURCE: 
NCH 
VALUES: 
— 
COMMENT: 
This field is the actual date associated with the principal or one of up to 24 other surgical procedure 
codes that is present on the last claim record included in the stay. 
There may be up to 25 procedures and dates. 
Note that until 2009, only six procedure codes were allowed. The principal procedure code is stored as 
the first procedure code (PRCDRCD1).
